meta.geometry: STEP capsule geometry: He-3 500 bar (r=10 mm bore, 60 mm on-axis), Al 0.6 mm barrel / 5 mm dome + CFRP 0.9 mm, MM front face 250 mm, ArIso drift gas
meta.notes: direction_error tables: rows = true particle KE bins, cols = psi bins, values = counts (X17+IPC combined, e- and e+ combined). energy_response tables: rows = true E_total bins (KE + me), cols = deposited-energy bins.
